items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-tier Imported Factory Gold Thread Embroidery with Imported Cowhide Shopping Bag
items.name_cn:

Tote Latest Autumn Winter Christmas Series, I was recommended this bag, the tote that can be carried is here. It retains the simplicity of the bag shape while also having the large capacity of a large bag. It can be carried by hand or crossbody, fully meeting daily travel needs. size:36*16*27cm

items.name_en: Dior Groove♣️16 Mini Handbag 'Cream Apricot Embossed Check'
items.name_cn:
Dior Groove♣️16 Mini Handbag 'Cream Apricot Embossed Check'
This Dior Groove 16 mini handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from carefully embossed apricot calfskin, it is embellished with a quilted oversized trellis pattern to elevate the style. The spacious compartment can hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for creating daily looks.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 1363
Size: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick

items.name_en: Dior Groove♣️ 20 Handbag 'Small Cream Apricot Embossed Check'
items.name_cn:
Dior Groove♣️ 20 Handbag 'Small Cream Apricot Embossed Check'
This Dior Groove 20 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from carefully embossed apricot calfskin, it is embellished with a quilted oversized trellis pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is embellished with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The zipper lock can be opened with the included key. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for creating daily looks.
Zipper closure, paired with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key charm embellished with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, paired with a key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1364
Size: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Small Lady Dior Handbag
White Calfskin Trellis
No.: M0531ONJK_M49U
This Lady Dior handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from white calfskin, it features a quilted texture created by trellis quilting lines, with a timeless and chic design. The brown tortoiseshell-effect resin D.I.O.R. charm complements the brand-new detachable chain shoulder strap, which alternates between light gold-finish metal links and brown tortoiseshell-effect resin O links. The small size comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand or crossbody.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Detachable O-link chain
Internal zip pocket
Can be paired with other Dior quilted shoulder straps
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Size: 20 x 17 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 mobile phone, and sunglasses

items.name_en: This diortravel nomad clutch blends various elements, making it a fashion statement. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric, it offers a spacious and versatile shape to hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a top handle with military-style CD buckles for easy hand-carry or shoulder wear. Metal rings on the sides allow you to connect the Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:
This diortravel nomad clutch blends various elements, making it a fashion statement. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric, it offers a spacious and versatile shape to hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a top handle with military-style CD buckles for easy hand-carry or shoulder wear. Metal rings on the sides allow you to connect the Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo,
Zipper closure,
Adjustable top handle with CD buckles,
2 metal rings to connect the series' embroidered shoulder strap and thin shoulder strap.
Number: S5554,
Dimensions: 22 x 13 x 9.5 cm

items.name_cn:
CARO Handbag M9243
The Caro Handbag is crafted from calfskin, featuring a quilted detail with the iconic diagonal stitching. The back features a debossed "30 Montaigne" logo. Soft material with a vintage gold-finish metal "CD" clasp on the flap, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Large size, equipped with a detachable iconic "CD" chain-link shoulder strap, which can also be replaced with an embroidered wide strap for a more elegant look. Effortlessly suitable for daily wear or evening parties.
Number: M9243
Dimensions: 28 x 17 x 9 cm

The M 30 Montaigne product line is inspired by 30 Montaigne, highlighting the classic identity. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Elegant details such as the '30 Montaigne' embossed logo on the back highlight the fashionable design. items.name_en: [Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
items.name_cn:
[Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. Designed for daily essentials, this large tote features all-over embroidery paired with the iconic blue Dior Oblique pattern and a "Christian Dior" logo on the front. Fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, it can be paired with other small accessories or Mitzah scarves for a cohesive look!
